response.overview: Chanel Preston and her step-daughter, Jade Baker, are eagerly waiting for Jaclyn Taylor and her step-daughter, Aidra Fox, to show up and help with some spring cleaning. When Jaclyn and Aidra arrive, Chanel is especially excited to greet Jaclyn, and it isn't long before the two step-mothers hurry off to clean out a closet. Lauren Phillips has called a meeting with Lily Larimar and her stepmother Becky Bandini. Lauren is worried that Lily is having such bad grades that she won't graduate from high school. To Lauren's shock, Becky is disappointed that Lily hasn't sucked up to Lauren (as Becky instructed her to do). Resolving to show Lily how it's done, Becky begins to seduce a flustered Lauren. Ryan Keely and her new fiancee, Kayla Paige, are together at Ryan's house
response.title: Mommy's Fantasy #4
